category_sources: source_facts.description says "Live Terminal Broadcast"; official shellshare.net says Shellshare broadcasts a terminal live with one command.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is shellshare; official shellshare.net uses the shellshare name.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the best documentation surface, with usage and FAQ sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/vitorbaptista/shellshare, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists shellshare; official shellshare.net documents terminal broadcasting, live sharing, room/password use, and self-hosting.
